comment: Pin a note to any region: drag a box on the deep-zoom canvas and the note anchors there. Redraw or nudge the box whenever you like.
_showoff: The hero interaction — box the drawn rectangle on the canvas.

comment: Or make a whole-object note with no box at all — a thin colour border frames the entire image instead of a region.
_showoff: wholeObject isn't a CSV field; draw this note by hand to demo the border.

comment: Write the note body in markdown.
_showoff: Show a bit of formatting (bold, a link) in the live note.

comment: Tag it — tags drive filtering and the search finder later.
Assign the note to a reading — one interpretive pass among several.
Emphasis makes a mark stand out or recede — normal, strong, or muted.
_showoff: Emphasis isn't in CSV; toggle it live for the screenshot.

comment: Delete a note in one click; its mark and region go with it.
Deep-zoom to pixel detail — but never past native resolution, nor out into an unreadable speck. The camera clamps both ends.
_showoff: Mount internal; box the zoom controls.
